violations.text: The establishment does not employ a full-time, on-site manager certified in food safety at all times when time temperature control for safety (TCS) food is being prepared, handled, and/or served. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knives) were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the (back outside) area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 05/28/2025

Staff were observed not wearing hair restraints. Food employees must wear hair restraints such as hats, hair coverings, or nets that are worn to effectively keep their hair from contacting exposed food, clean equipment/utensils, linens, and unwrapped single-service and single-use articles. New Violation. Correct By: 07/11/2023
Soap was not available at the hand-washing sink in the kitchen. Hand-washing sinks must be provided with a supply of hand cleaning liquid, powder, or bar soap. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Various meat products and rice was observed held at (43-47) degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling.Product Disposed Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Various meat products was observed not marked with the date of preparation. Ready-to-eat time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods prepared in the establishment and held for more than 24 hours must be marked with the date of preparation. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The presence of rodents is not controlled as evidenced by droppings in back storage area. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
Beverage containers and food product were observed stored on the floor in the the back storage area. Food must be stored at least 6 inches above the floor. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The facility is lacking test strips to measure the concentration of the chlorine sanitizing solution for the 3 bay sink. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
The non-food contact surfaces of the prep unit and 2 door refrigerators have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment or items were observed in the back storage area. Establishments shall be kept free of unnecessary and/or non-functional equipment and litter to prevent harborage conditions. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

The floors and walls throughout the mobile trailer and back storage trailer have an accumulation of soil residue and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023

Inspector observed hood system in mobile establishment with an accumulation oil and dust.The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 06/07/2023
